mapper.sql: large_code, mid_code, small_code, code_name, remark, print_seq, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TRAINING_CODE WHERE mid_code = '--' AND small_code = '--' ORDER BY print_seq

SELECT
FROM TRAINING_CODE WHERE large_code = #{large_code} ANd mid_code != '--' ANd small_code = '--' ORDER BY print_seq

SELECT
FROM TRAINING_CODE WHERE large_code = #{large_code} AND mid_code = #{mid_code} ANd small_code != '--' ORDER BY print_seq
